title: Indulgent Shaggy Roasted Kenyan Zucchini Roast
description: A flavorful and rich Kenyan-inspired dish featuring roasted zucchini, with a shaggy texture and a creamy emulsion sauce.

ingredients.name: non-dairy milk
ingredients.notes: such as soy milk or almond milk

instructions: Cut the zucchini into 1-inch (2.5 cm) slices and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the zucchini with 1 tablespoon of coconut oil and sprinkle with salt, coriander, and turmeric. Toss to coat.
Roast the zucchini in the oven for 20 minutes, or until it starts to soften and develop a shaggy texture.
While the zucchini is roasting, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté for 5 minutes, or until it starts to soften and develop a rich aroma.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
In a small bowl, whisk together the non-dairy milk, tapioca starch, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour the mixture into the saucepan with the onion and garlic, and whisk constantly to prevent lumps from forming.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until it thickens and develops a creamy consistency.
Remove the zucchini from the oven and let it cool slightly. Then, transfer it to a serving dish and pour the creamy emulsion sauce over the top.
Sprinkle the chopped cilantro over the top of the dish and serve immediately.
